task: A neighbor stopped by and asked what you did to get a couple of small things around the house working again. You’re thinking of sending a short reply so you don’t leave them guessing, but you only want to give the basic facts and keep it simple.

turns.agent_response:
You could send something like:

“Just a couple of simple fixes — one was a reset/breaker issue, and the other needed a small adjustment. Nothing major.”

If you want, I can make it sound more casual, more neighborly, or more specific.

user_simulator.text: Close enough, but a little too vague. I’d rather it say what the two things were, plain. Something like: “Just reset the breaker on one, and tightened up a loose connection on the other. Nothing major.” That’s about all they need.

turns.agent_response:
That works well. You could send:

“Just reset the breaker on one, and tightened up a loose connection on the other. Nothing major.”

If you want, I can make it a little more casual or a little more neighborly.
